pre_capture_js: (function() { var units = document.querySelectorAll('.unit-item:not(.unavailable)'); var text = ''; var seen = new Set(); units.forEach(function(u) { var t = u.textContent.trim().replace(/\s+/g, ' '); if (t.length > 10 && !seen.has(t)) { seen.add(t); text += t + '\n'; } }); if (text) { var div = document.createElement('div'); div.id = 'lnx-units'; div.textContent = text; document.body.appendChild(div); } })()
